/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/gltf_loader.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gltf_loader.dir/src/shader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gltf_loader.dir/src/model.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gltf_loader.dir/src/camera.cpp.o -o /Users/seangandre/Documents/GitHub/Atlys/Native/files/gltf_loader  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib _deps/glad-build/libglad.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libglm.dylib libtinyfiledialogs.a libimgui.a -framework OpenGL -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit _deps/glad-build/libglad.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libglfw.3.4.dylib
